title: Add nie-wallet crate to workspace
description: Create relay/cli/core-style crate skeleton. Add to workspace Cargo.toml. Add zcash_client_backend, zcash_primitives, zcash_proofs, zcash_address, tokio, sqlx dependencies. Pin versions. Verify cargo build --workspace still compiles.
close_reason: nie-wallet crate skeleton created in workspace. zcash_primitives/zcash_address 0.26/0.10 blocked by yanked core2 dep on crates.io — commented in Cargo.toml; zcash deps can be added when upstream publishes fix
